title: Thirumanangeeswarar Temple
tagline: Thirumanangeeswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Thirumanangeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in Melur, south of Minjur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Thirumanangeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located in Melur, south of Minjur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The temple is dedicated to Thiruvudai Amman as its chief goddess (Ichchaa Sakthi). The temple is one of the Sakthi triad in the Tondaimandalam region, the other two being the Kodiyidai Amman Temple or Masilamaniswara Temple at Thirumullaivoyal and the Vadivudai Amman Temple or Thyagaraja Temple at Tiruvottiyur.

topPlaces.name: Minjur
topPlaces.description: Minjur is a suburb located in the northern outskirts of Chennai, India. It is located in Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nandiambakkam
topPlaces.description: Nandiambakkam is a suburb in northern part of Chennai, Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is a northern part of Chennai city.

topPlaces.name: Seemapuram
topPlaces.description: Seemapuram, also known as Seemavaram, is a village in northern Tamil Nadu, India. It is located to the north of Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Gounderpalayam
topPlaces.description: Gounderpalayam (Tamil: கவுண்டர்பாளையம்), is a suburb in Tiruvallur, located North of Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India. A town with the same name also exists in Salem district with PIN 636113.

topPlaces.name: Athipattu Pudunagar
topPlaces.description: Athipattu Pudunagar [Acronym: ANT] (Tamil: அத்திப்பட்டு புது நகர் / அத்திப்பட்டு நியூ டவுன்) is a census town in Chennai at Thiruvallur district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is to the north of Chennai city.

topPlaces.name: Vellivayal
topPlaces.description: Vellivayal is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Pazhayanaappaalayam
topPlaces.description: Pazhayanaappaalayam (Tamil: பழையநாப்பாளையம்), is an residential area in Manali, North of Chennai, a metropolitan city in Tamil Nadu, India. In October 2011, the erstwhile Edayanchavadi village panchayat is merged with Greater Chennai Corporation and it came under the jurisdiction of Greater Chennai Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Athipattu
topPlaces.description: Athipattu is a census town in Thiruvallur district, Chennai in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The neighbourhood is served by Athipattu railway station of the Chennai Suburban Railway network.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thirumanangeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thirumanangeeswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thirumanangeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (31 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thirumanangeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thirumanangeeswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thirumanangeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thirumanangeeswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thirumanangeeswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Minjur, Nandiambakkam, Seemapuram, Gounderpalayam, Athipattu Pudunagar.
